name: package_localparam_non_trivial_expr
description: Code should include a package containing a localparam initialized with a non-trivial constant expression such as a shift operation.

name: wildcard_package_import
description: Code should include a wildcard import statement that imports all identifiers from a package into the current scope.

name: const_function_cross_package_localparam
description: Code should include a constant function whose return value references a localparam defined in an imported package.

name: localparam_init_by_const_function_call
description: Code should include a localparam initialized by calling a constant function with a constant argument.

name: package_localparam_bit_shift_expr
description: Code should include a localparam inside a package whose value is defined using a bitwise shift operation on an integer literal.

name: constant_function_returning_imported_param
description: Code should include a constant function that returns a value derived solely from a package-imported localparam, without taking any arguments.

name: localparam_const_function_with_unsized_literal_arg
description: Code should include a localparam initialized by a constant function call that passes an unsized literal such as '0 as the argument.

name: cross_package_localparam_constify
description: Code should include a module that imports a package via wildcard import, then references the imported localparam inside a constant function used for localparam initialization.
